listitem.para: * results = a tlist provided by function automatic
* namemod = the name of the sub-results to print in the results tlist ('initial model', 'stage 0 model', 'stage 1 union model', 'stage 2 union model', 'final model')
* test = %t if the user wants to print the specification tests results ; %f if not
* out = the file where the results are printed

refentry.refsection: DESCRIPTION Prints the sub-results named namemod in a tlist provided by automatic when there there is only one regression in the corresponding field (i.e initial, stage0, union or final model).

refsection.title: EXAMPLE
